name: Sugar 'n' Spice Apple-Nut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the egg to the mixture and beat well.
3. Sift in the dry ingredients: flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract.
5. Fold in the chopped apples and nuts.
6. Pour the batter into an 8-inch square pan.
7. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Serve warm with whipped cream or ice cream on top.
